overview: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI), a premier Central University established in 1920, is known for its strong academic foundation, diverse programs, and affordable education. It has consistently ranked among the top universities in India and is recognized for excellence in engineering, management, and humanities.
accreditation: Central University; NAAC 'A++' Grade (Cycle 2, CGPA 3.61/4.0, valid till Dec 2026). NIRF 2024: 3rd Universities, 24th Engineering, 25th Management.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹19,225 annually (~₹9,600/sem). Highly subsidized. One-time admission & caution deposit included.

placements.companiesVisited: Accenture, KPMG, CDOT, ICICI Bank, Samsung, TCS, Optum, Vedanta

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions based on JEE Main/CUET or university-specific entrance tests depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Follows CUET/JEE Main schedules and JMI academic calendar.

campus.specialNote: Hostel: ₹22,000–₹30,000/sem (merit-based, limited seats). Scholarships: Merit-cum-Means (income < ₹2L), Teachers Scholarship, Donor Scholarships, UGC Non-NET Fellowship.

contact.address: Jamia Millia Islamia, Jamia Nagar, New Delhi – 110025, India
